productDisplayName: Nike Men Sports White Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike capri shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Featuring lovely stitch and overlay details on a base colour, the nike capri sneakers are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperBreathable synthetic leather upper for Fit and flexibility Central lacing system for a snug fit Padded and meshed inner lining for a sweat-free comfort fitMidsoleAutoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feelOutsoleSolid rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior grip Pivot point below the big toe mound for superior traction Staright line grooves below toes and heel for traction and stabilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
